'''Mindori''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Kallistas]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. A [[Mining/Legends|mining]] town centered around some pits, it was the second oldest settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|world]], once with over 4,000 inhabitants, but reduced to some 70 of them during the rule of [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]]. Although nominally under Imperial control, the people were unhappy with Rinn and admired the local [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Jondrell Inx]].
